Title: Approves notice and proof of disability from an attending nurse practitioner
Summary: Approves notice and proof of disability or proof of need for family leave, or proof of disability for a special cross-bow permit, from an attending nurse practitioner.
LawCode: Amd §217, Work Comp L; amd §11-0901, En Con L
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the workers' compensation law and the environmental conservation law, in relation to approving notice and proof of disability from an attending nurse practitioner
